gui.narutoto.attribute_board.tooltip_dun: Crouch and press K to quickly open
gui.narutoto.attribute_board.tooltip_jia: Convert your minecraft experience into ninja experience
gui.narutoto.attribute_board.tooltip_jin: Melee Attack & Criti Power (including shadow clone)
gui.narutoto.attribute_board.tooltip_mei: Each player has a total of 500 SP to distribute, maximum 200 per attribute except intelligence
gui.narutoto.attribute_board.tooltip_nai: Nara Clan, able to use Nara Hijutsu
gui.narutoto.attribute_board.tooltip_ri_: Hyuga Clan, has the potential to open Byakugan
gui.narutoto.attribute_board.tooltip_ti_: Amount of healing & power of Iryo ninjutsu
gui.narutoto.attribute_board.tooltip_xia: Related command: /nnw_team, team members cannot attack each other
gui.narutoto.attribute_board.tooltip_xua: Uzumaki Clan, possessing tenacious vitality and huge amount of chakra
gui.narutoto.attribute_board.tooltip_xue: (INT) Learn New Jutsu & More jutsu slots (every 10 points adds one slot, maximum 50)
gui.narutoto.attribute_board.tooltip_yu_: Uchiha Clan, able to use Fire Release Ninjutsu and has the potential to open Sharingan

gui.narutoto.select_ninja_gui.label_your: your village, clan and nature chakra
gui.narutoto.select_ninja_gui.tooltip_bu: If you do not choose, it will be automatically selected randomly
gui.narutoto.select_ninja_gui.tooltip_ce: For testing, there may be bugs
gui.narutoto.select_ninja_gui.tooltip_ji: This will randomly select a clan, village and 0 or more nature chakra for you
gui.narutoto.select_ninja_gui.tooltip_na: Nara Clan, able to use Nara Hijutsu
gui.narutoto.select_ninja_gui.tooltip_ne: Uchiha Clan, able to use Fire Release Ninjutsu and has the potential to open Sharingan
gui.narutoto.select_ninja_gui.tooltip_ri: Hyuga Clan, has the potential to open Byakugan
gui.narutoto.select_ninja_gui.tooltip_ru: If you don't want to have any nature chakra and clan please click here
gui.narutoto.select_ninja_gui.tooltip_we: Fine-tune the position of the eye display, which is not guaranteed to be 100% correct
gui.narutoto.select_ninja_gui.tooltip_yo: Uzumaki Clan, possessing tenacious vitality and huge amount of chakra
gui.narutoto.select_ninja_gui.tooltip_zh: This will reset all your nature chakra, clan, sp and skilled, please confirm before clicking

mission.chunin: §cYou need to be a chunin to accept this mission
mission.genin: §cYou need to be a genin to accept this mission
mission.jonin: §cYou need to be a jonin to accept this mission
mission.only1: §cOnly one mission can be accepted at the same time
mission.owner.die: §cThe mission assignor has died and the mission has been cancelled.
mission1.yes: : Thank you! It should be nearby and won't go too far (right click to grab)
mission2.no: : Can I only be a Genin forever...
mission2.yes: : I will definitely show off my skills! (mission assignor must kill the zombie)
mission3.no: : Alas... Still have to go by myself...
mission3.yes: : Great, then I’ll leave it to you!
mission4.no: : Young people are really lack of motivation these days.
mission4.yes: : According to intelligence, it was last seen in
mission4.yes2: , go there and have a look.
mission5.no: : You are not beautiful at all...
mission5.yes: : Great, your heart is as beautiful as a flower! (Right-click the client while holding the flower to complete the task)
mission6.no: : It’s quite reasonable to refuse. After all, this mission is indeed a bit dangerous.
mission6.yes: : According to the investigation, the last trace of the missing-nin was near
mission6.yes2: , go there and have a look
mission7.no: : I don’t want to get into this trouble...
mission7.yes2: , just hand this scroll to him, be careful!
needle.hashirama: §7§oAfter right-clicking, there is a chance to obtain Hashirama's Cell. The higher the intelligence, the higher the success rate. After success, Chakra +1000
needle.info: §7§oAfter right-clicking, there is a chance to obtain the chakra nature. The higher the intelligence, the higher the success rate.
scroll.64_palms: §7§oPlace the opponent within the eight trigrams, and attack the sixty-four main acupuncture points on his body to seal his chakra. After a hit, the opponent will be temporarily unable to use ninjutsu (need to attack the target first).
scroll.amaterasu: §7§oUse Amaterasu to burn the front, and the enemy will be burned to death after hitting. Having the Eternal Mangekyō will reduce the amount of chakra consumed.
scroll.bansho_tenin: §7§oPull the target towards you. Crouch to cast to cancel.
scroll.byakugan_telescope: §7§oAfter releasing, you can freely observe anywhere within about 100 blocks around you (the transplanted eye range is reduced to 50 squares).
scroll.byakugo: §7§oAfter casting, it will release the Hundred Seal, improve physical ability and quickly heal all injuries, but not fatal injuries. Crouching to cast can condense chakra into the Hundred Seal, improving medical skilled can increase the maximum condensation value.
scroll.chakra_no_mesu: §7§oCondenses chakra to form a sharp blade on the hand, attacking the target to cause additional damage.
scroll.chibaku_tensei: §7§oConcentrate chakra into a black sphere. After the sphere automatically floats into the air, it will attract surrounding blocks and creatures on a large scale, and use the attracted blocks to create a huge sphere to crush the enemy.
scroll.chidori: §7§oGather lightning chakra in your hands. The next attack can pierce the opponent and cause a lot of damage. After casting, right click to use Chidori Eiso.
scroll.cho_odama: §7§oAfter jumping upward, gather a Cho Odama Rasengan to attack downward.
scroll.daitoppa: §7§oBlows away creatures in its path and causes damage.
scroll.doryo_dango: §7§oLift a big stone from the ground and throw it forward.
scroll.doryu_heki: §7§oBuild an earth wall in front of you. Right-click the earth wall to collapse it.
scroll.eight_gates3: TS.20§7§o3rd Gate·Seimon: Increase attack & speed, body emits green energy
scroll.eight_gates4: TS.40§7§o4th Gate·Shomon: Increase attack & speed, body begins to suffer damage
scroll.eight_gates7: TS.160§7§o7th Gate·Kyomon: Increase attack & speed, body emits blue vapor
scroll.eight_gates8: TS.300§7§o8th Gate·Shimon: Increases attack & speed, body emits red vapor. You can press V in the air to move in the air. After being released, you will die directly
scroll.frog: §7§oCasts Genjutsu on surrounding creatures, the default duration is 3 seconds, and the duration can be extended by increasing the sage skilled, up to 6 seconds. The frog couple needs to be on the shoulders to cast it.
scroll.gamayu_endan: §7§oRide on Gamabunta and spray a large amount of fire forward. You need to ride on Gamabunta to cast it.
scroll.goka_mekkyaku: §7§oSpew out a huge amount of fire forward, burning everything.
scroll.goremu: §7§oSummons a clay giant to fight for you, its health and attack power will increase with ninjutsu sp and earth skilled, cast again to cancel.
scroll.goryuka: §7§oSummon a fire dragon to attack enemy.
scroll.haijinkagure: §7§oSpits out a ball of hot dust, causing heat damage to creatures within range.
scroll.hakke_fuin: §7§oRight-click the target to cast. The target's health must be less than a quarter of its total health. After casting, the target will be permanently unable to move. Cast again to cancel it. Can be used to seal the tailed beasts. For details, please see the tutorial website
scroll.hakke_kusho: §7§oHit out a Juken in the air, knocking back enemies within range and causing damage.
scroll.hiraishin: §7§o←、→ keys to switch between markers (a total of 5 available), right-click on a block or entity to mark. After pressing the Z key, right-click while holding the corresponding item to teleport.
scroll.hirudora: §7§oSwing forward a super-fast punch to form an air cannon to attack the enemy.
scroll.jukai_kotan: §7§oSeveral trees will quickly grow from the ground, changing the battlefield into a forest. In the forest, creatures that are hostile to you or that you attack will be entangled by the trees. Right-clicking a target with bare hand will remove the entanglement.
scroll.juken: §7§oWhen activated, attacking the opponent will drive your own chakra into the opponent's body, causing additional damage to the target and making it temporarily unable to release ninjutsu.
scroll.kage_kubishibari_no_jutsu: §7§oUsable when the opponent is restrained by Kagemane No Jutsu, use shadow to tighten the opponent, causing continuous damage to the opponent. Crouch and cast to cancel
scroll.kage_nui_no_jutsu: §7§oUsable when the opponent is restrained by Kagemane No Jutsu, piercing the opponent with shadow, causing heavy damage
scroll.kagemane: §7§oBound the opponent with shadow, making it unable to move and mimic the caster's movements. Cannot be used in dark places. Crouch and cast to cancel
scroll.kagutsuchi: §7§oShoots projectile forward with Amaterasu effect, cast while crouching to use Honoikazuchi, attacking the surrounding area. Right-click the target hit by Amaterasu to cancel it, right-click the air with bare hands to cancel Amaterasu that hits you.
scroll.kaiten: §7§oRelease chakra from the chakra points all over your body and rotate your body to cause damage to surrounding creatures. You will be invincible during use.
scroll.kamui_intangible: §7§oAfter activation, you will become invincible, but will not be able to attack in melee. You can drill into the block by right-clicking on the block. In the released state, right-clicking an entity can suck it into Kamui dimension/main world. Crouching and casting can suck yourself into Kamui dimension/main world.
scroll.kamui_transfer: §7§oUse the ← and → keys to switch the usage method. "Part" is to involve part of the target's body into Kamui dimension/main world, causing damage to it. "Whole" is to directly suck the target into Kamui dimension/main world. Crouching and casting can suck yourself into Kamui dimension/main world.
scroll.kaze_no_yaiba: §7§oUse the wind blade to cause continuous large amounts of damage to all creatures in front of you.
scroll.keijugan: §7§oReduce your own weight to achieve the effect of flying, but with a weakening effect. Right click to cast on other players.
scroll.kirin: §7§oGathers thunder and lightning, and casts it again after the gathering is completed, causing a large amount of damage to enemies within the surrounding area and temporarily paralyzing them.
scroll.kongo_fusa: §7§oSummon chains to bind surrounding creatures, making them unable to move. Holding the crouch key will cause damage to them (will consume extra chakra, damage increases with skilled). Each additional chain will increase the chakra consumption. Right click to cast on a single target, crouching to cast can cancel this jutsu.
scroll.mizuranpa: §7§oSpit out waves of water forward, causing damage and slowing down creatures in it's path.
scroll.mokujoheki: §7§oCreate wooden pillars from the ground to form a buttress to protect yourself. Crouch to right click the block to remove.
scroll.mokusatsu_shibari: §7§oGenerates fast-growing branches to bind the target. Hold down the crouch key to strangle the opponent and deal damage. Crouch to cast or right click target with bare hand to cancel.
scroll.raiju_tsuiga: §7§oControl the wolf formed by lightning to attack, and the target will be temporarily paralyzed
scroll.raikyu: §7§oFires 3 thunderballs forward, causing damage and slowing down creatures.
scroll.rasen_shuriken: §7§oAfter casting, right click to throw it, causing continuous damage to creatures within range.
scroll.rasengan: §7§oCondenses a chakra compression ball in the hand, the next attack will cause a lot of damage, hold down the cast button to charge to use Cho Odama Rasengan.
scroll.retsudo_tensho: §7§oSlap on the ground, knocking up surrounding creatures and causing damage.
scroll.sage: §7§oAfter casting, you will enter Sage Mode, gain many buff effects and increase the power of Ninjutsu. Wearing the Frog Couple can slow down the loss of Sage Chakra. Crouching to cast can condense Sage Chakra. Improving Senjutsu skilled can increase the maximum condensation value.
scroll.sashiki: §7§oCreate a wooden thorn in your hand. Attack the opponent to insert the wooden thorn into the opponent. After 1.5 seconds, the wooden thorn will branch out and grow in the opponent's body, causing secondary damage. Right click to throw the wooden thorn out.
scroll.sasuke_susanoo: §7§oClick ⭢ to switch types. Consume chakra to resist attacks. In skeleton type, hold the attack item and right-click to use heavy smash, only the Sharingan with both eyes can learn it.
scroll.sekizo: §7§oStrikes the air to create a powerful air cannon that can be used 5 times.
scroll.shadow_clone: §7§oSummon shadow clones, right click to cancel (crouch right-click to cancel with range), their health and attack power will be divided equally according to your current values. By default, only 5 can be summoned, you can increase the number of summons by clicking high chakra sp.
scroll.sharingan: §7§oCast when there is a Sharingan symbol on the target's head to make the target fall into a genjutsu, the default duration is 3 seconds, and the duration can be extended by increasing the dojutsu sp or skilled, up to 9 seconds.
scroll.shichuro: §7§oGenerates wood from the ground to form a wooden cell. Crouch to right click the block to remove.
scroll.shinkuha: §7§o Exhales wind chakra from the mouth, severing the enemy's body.
scroll.shinra_tensei: §7§oBounces creatures within 10 blocks around and causes damage. Press and hold the cast button to charge. After charging, you can use Cho·Shinra Tensei, which consumes 2000 chakra and will not leave any drops.
scroll.shosen_jutsu: §7§oHeal yourself after releasing, right-click to heal other entities.
scroll.suidanha: §7§oSpray a high-pressure water column forward, cutting off everything (will destroy block).
scroll.suiro: §7§oRight-clicking on a creature can trap it in a water prison. If the distance between the caster and the target is too far, it will be automatically released.
scroll.suiryudan: §7§oSummon a water dragon to attack enemy.
scroll.summoning_toad: §7§oClick to summon Gamabunta and fight with him. Only after successfully defeating him can you learn this ninjutsu.
scroll.tarengan: §7§oSummon 10 shadow clones and use the Cho Odama Rasengan at the same time. It requires 5 points of chakra attribute to learn.
scroll.ura_renge: §7§oSprint forward. If there are creatures on the path, they will be knocked away and perform a series of supersonic strikes on them.
scroll.yagai: §7§oKick forward with power that can distort space. You will die after using it.
sharingan.eyeball: §7§oAfter right-clicking, there is a chance to obtain Sharingan.
text.already_eternal: §cYou have already activated the eternal mangekyo
text.border: §cYou are approaching the limit of Byakugan
text.can.not.learn: §cCan't learn it now, please make sure you meet the learning conditions, such as having the corresponding nature chakra or enough JP or SP.
text.cho_mini: §7§oCondenses a Cho Mini Bijudama in the hand, the next attack will cause a lot of damage, the power increases with tailed beast skilled.
text.chunin_exam: Miso9012: Are you my opponent? Get ready and let the battle begin!
text.clone_exceed: §cThe number of shadow clones has exceeded the number you can summon
text.eight_gates3: §cYou need to open The 3rd Gate to use it
text.eight_gates6: §cYou need to open The 6th Gate to use it
text.eight_gates7: §cYou need to open The 7th Gate to use it
text.eight_gates8: §cYou need to open The 8th Gate to use it
text.guy.level: Might Guy: You are still too immature. Come to me when your taijutsu reaches 3 and your intelligence reaches 10.
text.guy.yes: Might Guy: Then crouch 100 times and jump 100 times. After completing it, I will teach you the Eight Gates, BURN YOUR YOUTH!
text.iruka.already.chunin: Umino Iruka: You are already a chunin!
text.iruka.already.genin: Umino Iruka: You are already a genin!
text.iruka.already.jonin: Umino Iruka: You are already a jonin!
text.iruka.chunin: Umino Iruka: To become a chunin, you need to defeat the opponent I arranged for you. He is waiting for you at
text.iruka.chunin.level: Umino Iruka: Your ninja level is not high enough. Come to me after you reach level 20.
text.iruka.chunin_first: Umino Iruka: You need to become a chunin first.
text.iruka.genin: Umino Iruka: To become a genin, you need to pass the bell grabbing test. Kakashi is already waiting for you at
text.iruka.genin.level: Umino Iruka: Your ninja level is not high enough. Come to me after you reach level 10.
text.iruka.genin_first: Umino Iruka: You need to become a genin first.
text.iruka.jonin: Umino Iruka: To become a jonin, you need to kill 5 missing-nins.
text.iruka.jonin.level: Umino Iruka: Your ninja level is not high enough. Come to me after you reach level 30.
text.iruka.kage: Umino Iruka: To become a Kage, you need to reach level 50, have a friendship level of 40 or more with your village, and defeat the Ender Dragon to prove yourself as a powerful and trustworthy ninja.
text.it_full: §cThe object is already full of health
text.jiraiya.level: Jiraiya: It's too early for you to learn Sage Mode now. Come to me when your intelligence reaches 40.
text.jiraiya.yes: Jiraiya: The most important thing in learning Sage Mode is "quietness". Try crouching still and feeling the natural energy!
text.jiraiya_cancel_amaterasu: Jiraiya: This thing is very dangerous, be careful not to get hit again!
text.jiraiya_no_amaterasu: Jiraiya: What Amaterasu? I didn't see anything.
text.kakashi_bell: Hatake Kakashi: You are finally here. If you want to pass the bell grabbing test, you must right-click on me without being attacked when the bell icon appears on my head. After successfully pressing it three times, You can pass. Attack me when you're ready to get started.
text.kill_kakashi: Kill Hatake Kakashi, Ninja experience+1000, SP+2
text.kill_neji: Kill Hyuga Neji, Ninja experience+1000, SP+2
text.kill_sasuke: Kill Uchiha Sasuke, Ninja experience+2000, SP+5
text.killerbee.level: Killer Bee: You don’t have enough ninja level bro, wait until you are 30 or so.
text.kurama_hand: §7§oKurama strikes forward, the power increases with tailed beast skilled.
text.kurama_hand2: §7§oKurama swings forward, the power increases with tailed beast skilled.
text.levelup: §eLevel up! Gain 5 attribute points and 2 jutsu points
text.minato.level: Namikaze Minato: You are not able to master Hiraishin Jutsu yet. Come to me when your intelligence reaches 40.
text.minato.yes: Namikaze Minato: Remember, I will only be on the surface and will not hide in the cave (right-click to catch)
text.mysterious_no: Mysterious Trader: Take it or leave it.
text.mysterious_no_money: Mysterious Trader: You still want to buy it if you don’t have money? Go and make money!
text.mysterious_yes: Mysterious Trader: If you are not satisfied, you are welcome to buy from me again.
text.need_byakugan: §cYou need to activate Byakugan to use it
text.need_ground: §cYou need to stand on the ground
text.needsage: §cYou need to activate Sage Mode to use it
text.needtoopenmangekyo: §cYou need to activate Mangekyo Sharingan to use it
text.needtoopenrinnegan: §cYou need to activate Rinnegan to use it
text.needtoopensharingan: §cYou need to activate Sharingan to use it
text.nine_tailed_hand: §7§o Use the Tailed Beast Hand to slam the ground, the power increases with tailed beast skilled.
text.noaltar: §c§lThere is no Hakke Fuin Altar nearby
text.nofrog: §cThe frogs are not on your shoulders
text.nosageclonenear: §cThere are no sage clones within the range
text.not_mailbox_owner: §cYou are not the owner of this mailbox
text.notail: §cYou still can't fully control the power of the tailed beast
text.notenoughlowhealth: §cThe target's health is not low enough
text.notongama: §cYou need to ride on Gamabunta to release it
text.only9: §cThe Nine-Tailed Jinchuuriki already exists in this world
text.sagecloneexceed: §cOnly 2 shadow clones can be charged at the same time
text.susanoo_100: §cYou need 100 dojutsu skilled to activate it
text.susanoo_200: §cYou need 200 dojutsu skilled to activate it
text.susanoo_300: §cYou need 300 dojutsu skilled to activate it
text.susanoo_bow: §7§oShoots Susanoo arrow, the power increases with dojutsu points and skilled.
text.susanoo_feet: §7§oStomps the ground, dealing damage to nearby creatures, the power increases with dojutsu points and skilled.
text.susanoo_fist: §7§oPunch forward, the power increases with dojutsu points and skilled.
text.susanoo_sword: §7§oChop forward, dealing heavy damage to creatures in its path, the power increases with dojutsu points and skilled.
text.tailed_bomb: §7§oFire a Tailed Beast Ball, the power increases with tailed beast skilled.
text.tailed_hand: §7§oUse the Tailed Beast Hand to attack creatures within range, the power increases with tailed beast skilled.
text.tsunade_byakugo: Tsunade: To learn Byakugo No Jutsu, you must first master Sozo Saisei. Find a way to survive my attacks within the time limit.§7§o (Right-click Tsunade to start the trial. During this period, you can only use Shosen Jutsu. The trial is completed after 40 seconds.)
text.tsunade_byakugo_level: Tsunade: It is too early for you to learn Byakugo No Jutsu now. Come back to me when your intelligence reaches 20 and your medical skilled reaches 300.
text.tsunade_iryo: Tsunade: To become a qualified Iryo ninja, dedicated training is essential. Find a way to make this fish in front of you jump again§7§o (Right-click to start treatment. When the fish glows, you need to right-click to treat it. A successful treatment will increase your medical skilled by +2. If you can finally make the fish jump, it will increase by +10. However, if you make a mistake in right-clicking or the player moves, the fish will die immediately)
text.tsunade_iryo_level: Tsunade: You are not qualified to be a Iryo ninja now. Come to me again when your intelligence reaches 10.
uchiha.eyeball: §7§oAfter obtaining Sasuke's Mangekyo Sharingan, right-click to obtain the Eternal Mangekyo Sharingan.
